description.value:
Source: Ariadne's Book of Legends - Alpha v1.2, p. 104.

Heroic Path: Warlord

Prerequisite: A Strength or Dexterity score of 20 or higher. Tier I: Elite Skirmisher

Advantaged Strike. You have advantage on the first attack you make on your turn.

Deflection. As a reaction when you or a creature within range of your currently equipped melee weapon is targeted by an attack, you can attempt to deflect it. Make a weapon attack. If the result is higher than the triggering strike’s attack roll, the attack misses as you deflect it. Heroic Perk: Technique Student

Prerequisite: Elite Skirmisher

You learn a Mythical Technique available to your class. If you have no Mythical Techniques available to your class, you learn the Reality Slash Mythical Technique. Tier II: Combat Master

Prerequisite: Technique Student

Defensive Proficiency. While wielding a melee weapon, increase your AC by 3.

Greater Critical. Your critical range is increased by 1. When you score a critical hit, your attack ignores resistances to its damage type.

Perfected Saves. You gain proficiency in Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saving throws. Heroic Perk: Perfect Body

Prerequisite: Combat Master

Your Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution scores are increased to 20, unless they are already higher without this benefit. Scores that are already above 20 instead increase by 1, up to a maximum of 24. Tier III: Warlord

Prerequisite: Perfect Body

Mythical Technique. You learn a Mythical Technique of your choice from any class’s list.

Technique Savant. Whenever you use a Mythical Technique that expends 2 or more Legendary Points, you expend 1 less Legendary Point when you use that technique.

source.custom: Original en-US text from Alpha v1.2
